CustomField.description: Interpolated Rate before escalation.From Summer 21 the system escalating Rates before Interpolation. This is an old field left for backward compatibility and history tracking
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Interpolated Rate before escalation.From Summer 21 the system escalating Rates before Interpolation. This is an old field left for backward compatibility and history tracking
CustomField.label: MR Rate (Pre-Esc)(Deprecated)
